title: Active and Growing
subtitle: Movements become more noticeable
description: By week 21, your baby is growing steadily and becoming more active. Movements are now more noticeable and may follow a pattern, giving you a better sense of your baby’s activity.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements become more regular and noticeable
You may start recognizing movement patterns
Your baby continues steady growth and development
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow regular routines
Engage in light exercise and maintain good posture

medical_checkups.note: Routine monitoring continues after the anomaly scan stage.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and fetal growth

commonly_suggested.name: Follow-up Tests (if advised)
commonly_suggested.purpose: Evaluates any findings from earlier scans

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will guide you on any follow-up tests based on previous reports and your health condition.

important_note: Recognizing movement patterns can help you stay aware of your baby’s well-being.
reassurance: Your baby’s movements are a reassuring sign of healthy development.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice any sudden changes in movement patterns.

diabetes.personalized_description: Stable blood sugar levels support ongoing growth and activity.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored during routine prenatal visits.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support oxygen supply during increased activity.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this active stage.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued development and metabolism.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As movements become more regular, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy progress.
